final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit synchronous counter that decrements its value by one on every rising edge of the clock (CK). If the reset (RST) signal is asserted, the counter is set to zero. Otherwise, it continues decrementing, allowing it to cycle through values from 15 to 0.
module top_module(
    input wire CK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge CK) begin
        if(RST) begin
            Q <= 4'b0;
        end
        else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit synchronous counter that decrements its value by one on every rising edge of the clock (CK). If the reset (RST) signal is asserted, the counter is set to zero. Otherwise, it continues decrementing, allowing it to cycle through values from 15 to 0.
